## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation
- [ ] `dotnet test src/QuartzKnowledgeMcp.slnx --no-build`
- [ ] `dotnet test src/QuartzKnowledgeMcp.slnx --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage"`
- [ ] I confirmed the line coverage baseline remains at or above 85%, or I explained why it temporarily dropped.

## Docs
- [ ] I updated the relevant docs or confirmed no docs changes were needed.
- [ ] If dashboard behavior changed, I included browser smoke evidence or screenshots.

## Risks
- [ ] I documented any remaining risks, follow-up work, or known gaps.
